feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: UI Edit Mode
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to ask, how can I move, work with tabs inside a document in UI Edit Mode. As you can see in the image below, the tabs got stuck and I am not able work with them. Is there any shortcut or something ? 

Thanks for any response.

entry.title: SAP Business One audit trail report
entry.content:
Our B1 users are asking for an audit trail report from B1 for local legal requirement, which can view all change logs and exactly tell the field change with old value and new value among each log instance. Does anyone create it before? If yes, possible to share the query? If not, any other work-around methods? Any ideas/thoughts, please let me know. Thanks!

SAP Business One

entry.title: Query for Prodution order nº, Receipt from Production (SI), Issue for Production(SO)
entry.content:
Hello everyone. Can you please help me to create a Query that contains the Receipt from Production (SI) and the Issue for Production (SO), for each production order?

It is also important that you can filter by date.

The objective is to classify the consumption of raw materials by business area (Distr. Rule), which we already have at the sales level, and now we want to go backwards to recover the data for 2024 at the cost level.

The ideal would be to create a table with a structure similar to this:

Prodution order nº / Receipt from Production (SI) / Issue for Production(SO)

Many thanks.

SAP Business One #SAP B1

entry.title: Which localization to use when running B1 in Kazakhstan?
entry.content:
Hi 

  We are trying to setup B1 in Kazakhstan. Please advise which localization we should select for KZ. Shall we use Russia? Ukraine or any other localization?

  Thanks!

SAP Business One

entry.title: User-defined fields order
entry.content:
We use SAP Business One 10.0.

How can I specify the display order of the user-defined fields for all users in a form?

entry.title: Format not compatible with SAP Business One 1000130; contact format provider for support
entry.content:
Dear all,

While executing Financial Reports which is provided by SAP then it is showing error like "Format not compatible with SAP Business One 1000130; contact format provider for support"

SAP Business One

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: AR INVOICE ITEM ROW TOTALFC
entry.content:
Hi All

There is no INV1.LineTotalFC though there is INV1.LineTotal?  Is it the only way is to manually calculate by INV1.Price (After Discount) x T1. Quantity to get LineTotal in Foreign BP Currency?

There are both OINV.DocTotal and OINV.DocTotalFC.

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: It is compulsory to close the Production order SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

It is compulsory to close the Production order SAP Business One or not?  what happend if user cannot close the production order?

SAP Business One 

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: Installation Failed when installing the Web client for the SAP Business One 10 PL 02 for SQL
entry.content:
Hi 

i need your expert opinion on Web Client why when we install web client it always failed is there any work around to install Web Client. but when i try to install from MSI, i can install it but not working and the webclient folder is not created... how can i resolved this issue or is it possible to install newer version of Web Client. i have perform install and uinstall multiple times but still failed..... please advice

 

thank you

Zernan

entry.title: Database creation based on one SAP B1 Hana Database
entry.content:
In SAP B1 Version 10 with SQL Server, We can create new database using Solution manager through which we can copy UDF,UDT, SP, Master data etc to new target db.

Can anyone suggest weather solution manager available in SAP B1 Ver 10 for Hana? 

If not then which tool we can use to create new SAP B1 Hana database based on existing.

entry.title: Web Client Error
entry.content: We recently tried upgrading the web client to 10.00.250 PL15 on our dev environment. We are encountering this error whenever we attempt to login on the web client portal. Anyone knows what causing this? If you guys need more information to help me fix this this issue, then I could provide more context about this matter.

entry.title: SAP Business One - equalization tax
entry.content: I can't find how to add the sales equalization tax for suppliers. We buy porducts and sell them in the same status, so we have to pay that tax to the suppliers when we get stock. The question is, where can I do it? When I add the invoice in the system, that information should be showed as the taxes do. So how can I show it? How do I have to configurate our SAP Business 1 to show it? I have located it in the clients screen but not for suppliers.

entry.title: Modificar tasa de cambio en asiento contable manual
entry.content:
Hola expertos

Necesito de su ayuda, resulta que estoy trabajando con SAP B1 10 en una base que posee doble moneda. Mi problema es que al tratar de hacer un asiento contable manual en La Moneda extranjera SAP usa la tasa de cambio configurada para el día en que lo estoy creado (Fecha de contabilización) 

Lo que deseo es poder modificar la tasa de cambio desde el asiento como se hace en módulo de bancos, he encontrado el campo "Tipo de cambio de informes de revaloración" pero no modifica el cálculo.

Alguien puede ayudarme o indicarme como lo solventan en sus países

Gracias por su ayuda

entry.title: open attachment from webclient
entry.content:
Hi expert,

Customer is using SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.191) FP 2202 (64-bit)

We able to attach attachment from webclient by giving mounting the folder.

But when we want to view the attachment from webclient. It give error as below;

Any setting need to setup for viewing from webclient?

Please advise.

Thank you.

Best regards,

Tan Su Hsiang

entry.title: Production Order Child Item is another BoM's Parent Item SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

Need to understand on BoM Calculation. 

If We used One Child item into Production Order which is already Parent Item of another BoM then Child item quantity is not deducted from stock. 

Example

Parent 1

                 Child 1

                 Child 2

Here, Child 1 is contain BoM like

Child 1 

      Child 3

       Child 4

 

Here, While generate the production order for Parent 1 Item then Child 3 and Child 3 stock is not deducted from Warehouse. 

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: Service Layer with return error code 408
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am facing the issues with Service Layer when processing the data interface from SQL Data, we're built a portal to execute Job Service to POST data to Service Layer but unfortunately sometimes we got the http 408 code error return at around 23 hours same time.

Hope fully to get experiences sharing from experts.

Thanks so much,

entry.title: Access Customer Group and Period Volume Discounts in the database through the CCO plugin
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I hope this message finds you well.

I have a small requirement to change the discount procedure in customer checkout. For that, I have to access the discount percentages from the CCO database. I have tried several ways to access discount percentages; some do not work or match the requirements.

So, I want to know,

  1. How do I fetch Customer Group and Period Volume Discount Percentage from Squirrel DB for a Single Article/Material?

As an example, there is an Item called ‘GRO-000’ and I want to fetch Customer Group and Period and Volume Discount percentages separately.

Your valuable guidance, articles, or documents related to solving this problem is greatly appreciated.

Thank You.!

Best Regards,

Ashen.

entry.title: Price List in Foreign Currency for multiple UoM
entry.content:
Hello everyone.

I have an item with two UoM, And would like to update the price list in foreign currency, but receive the error. Anyone can advice?

entry.title: User Authorizations change in version 10
entry.content:
Hi All

Any idea what other changes in User Authorization in version 10 other than a more detail Authorization of Business Partner Master Data on separate Tabs?

Is there any relevant SAP Note or explanation guide?

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Sales Buzz
entry.content:
Any one know about this production or add-on on top SAP Business One,

 

Kindly let me know

Sreeni
